operating_ranges.evidence: RAC: 1,300°C (2,370°F) and ROB: 1,300°C (2,370°F) for Kanthal® A-1
FIBROTHAL® MEANDER SYSTEM II: 1,350°C (2,460°F) and FIBROTHAL® MEANDER SYSTEM III: 1,350°C (2,460°F) for Kanthal® APM
FIBROTHAL® PANELS EMBEDDED: 1,150°C (2,100°F) for Kanthal® A-1
The internal temperature of the device is measured in °C and given as INTERNAL_TEMP
Hot resistance is approximately 4% higher, equal to 9.8 Ω

degradation_mechanisms.rate_description: may change during operation even at the same flow rate
degradation_mechanisms.evidence: The value depends on many parameters: Pressure conditions, Temperature, Contamination, Age, May change during operation even at the same flow rate
the heating element alloy, Kanthal® A-1, results in a maximum resistance increase of only 4%

fault_conditions.name: temp_power_alarm_zone_3
fault_conditions.symptoms: SET and RESET status indicators in alarm log

fault_conditions.name: heat_exchanger_failure
fault_conditions.symptoms: fans not running smoothly, leaking or clogged heat exchanger
fault_conditions.evidence: If heat exchanger is leaking or clogged, replace with new one

fault_conditions.name: fan_failure
fault_conditions.evidence: If one fan is out of order, it can be replaced at the next convenient moment

maintenance_actions.name: heat_exchanger_inspection
maintenance_actions.evidence: Check monthly if all fans are running smoothly

maintenance_actions.name: zero_adjustment_check
maintenance_actions.evidence: To achieve optimum accuracy and reliability, periodically check zero readout and readjust if necessary

maintenance_actions.name: annual_recalibration
maintenance_actions.evidence: Recommended: Annual maintenance and recalibration at MKS service center if nothing else specified

assumptions.statement: Temperature control system encompasses both heating elements and temperature measurement components
assumptions.reason: Manual excerpts contain both heating system specifications and temperature measurement data logging capabilities
Alarm logs reference 'Temp. power alarm zone 3' indicating multiple temperature zones
